steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Authoritative Vectors · Theory Crypto Go Authoritative Vectors
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 3613 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine authoritative vectors, negative mutation, bounded fuzzing, reproducibility, and cross-implementation evidence; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use authoritative known-answer and protocol vectors with provenance, exact bytes, expected successes, expected failures, and stable fixtures.
